purpose_string: Condition every swing apex and every four-hoof recovery beat explicitly with nine immutable browser Three.js frames, so the LTX graph cannot infer overlapping swings between sparse guides.

predecessor_experiment_object.result_string: The six-guide contract encoded touchdown only in text between swing apexes. V12 adds explicit byte-identical four-hoof recovery conditioning at frames 12, 24 and 36 while retaining the same model, camera, renderer and seed.

positive_prompt_string: Locked-camera inverse skeletal fitting reference of the exact canonical actionless horse and camera. Follow all nine supplied browser Three.js conditioning frames exactly. The four swing windows are hard, ordered and non-overlapping: hind-left only during frames 1-11 with apex frame 6; fore-left only during frames 13-23 with apex frame 18; hind-right only during frames 25-35 with apex frame 30; fore-right only during frames 37-47 with apex frame 42. Frames 0, 12, 24, 36 and 48 are hard four-hoof recovery barriers: all four hooves are fully planted and motionless, and no next swing may start before the preceding barrier is reached. A visible hoof contact cue means that exact hoof is planted and motionless on the ground; it never means hovering, sliding or merely near the ground. At most one hoof is in swing at any frame and at least three hooves remain planted, with no flight or suspension frame. Every leg, including each fetlock-pastern-hoof distal chain, remains one opaque connected fixed-length anatomical chain in every frame. Preserve continuous solid limb silhouette, constant segment lengths and one compact attached hoof per leg. Never create a ghost limb or ghost hoof, detached limb or detached hoof, wavy limb or wavy distal chain, transparency, length snap or segment-length snap. Interpolate one smooth anatomically correct four-beat walk cycle in place through the exact alternating swing windows and hard recovery barriers. Preserve one identical horse, its geometry, proportions, materials, four persistent legs, four compact hooves, background, exposure and fixed camera with no net translation or seam pause.
negative_prompt_string: camera movement, crop, zoom, scene cut, background change, background fade, ground disappearance, exposure drift, lighting flicker, duplicate horse, identity change, extra limb, missing limb, ghost limb, ghost hoof, ghost distal segment, detached limb, detached hoof, detached distal segment, wavy limb, wavy distal chain, transparent limb, translucent limb, broken silhouette, length snap, segment-length snap, changing segment length, stretched distal chain, compressed distal chain, paired hoof swing, overlapping hoof swing, swing outside frames 1-11 13-23 25-35 37-47, crossing recovery barrier, moving hoof on visible contact cue, hovering hoof on visible contact cue, foot sliding, hoof skating, diagonal pair, lateral pair, trot, pace, hop, bound, gallop, flight phase, suspension phase, fewer than three planted hooves, ground penetration, broken joint, rubber limb, curled distal limb, hoof morphing, material change, endpoint freeze, text, watermark
controlled_variable_string: The v11 model, camera, renderer, LTX workflow, resolution, prompt family and seed remain fixed; frames 12, 24 and 36 are now explicit four-hoof recovery guides at strength 0.85 in the official LTXVAddGuide chain.
fixed_factors_array: same immutable actionless Horse model and camera provenance
same unified browser Three.js static scene for every guide
same pinned LTX 19B FP8 checkpoint and static-camera LoRA
no Blender and no unavailable control model
manual_acceptance_gates_array: frames 0, 12, 24, 36 and 48 have the exact endpoint SHA-256
all nine guide PNGs are browser-rendered under one pinned static-scene contract
contactCueQa and postBakeQa remain PASS for all nine guides
exactly nine ordered LTXVAddGuide nodes condition frames 0, 6, 12, 18, 24, 30, 36, 42 and N-1
swing motion is bounded to hind-left 1-11, fore-left 13-23, hind-right 25-35 and fore-right 37-47
frames 0, 12, 24, 36 and 48 are hard four-hoof planted and motionless barriers
every visible contact cue corresponds to a planted motionless hoof
all distal leg chains remain opaque, connected and fixed-length without ghost, detached, wavy or length-snap artifacts
all four swing guides show exactly one lifted hoof in hind-left, fore-left, hind-right, fore-right order
no paired or overlapping swing frame, no flight frame and at least three planted hooves at every frame
TAPNext gait QA orderAccepted and overlapAccepted are both true
candidate remains generated_not_approved until browser fitting and fixed-camera visual QA pass

generation_authorization_object.required_next_action_string: Runtime authorization must exactly match this immutable experiment id.
